name: DANKOTUWA PORCELAI
summary: DANKOTUWA PORCELAIN PLC is a Sri Lankan company involved in the manufacturing and sale of porcelain tableware and giftware. The company's products include dinnerware, tea sets, and decorative items, catering to both domestic and international markets, with its headquarters located in Dankotuwa, Sri Lanka. The business model focuses on leveraging local resources and craftsmanship to produce high-quality porcelain products.
